MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Alexandra M. Ozols of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, (415-262-8535) for defendant / moving party Trimon Inc.
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Robert Jepsen

RULING:
DEFENDANT TRIMON INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Trimon, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, motion for summary adjudication is denied as untimely. Defendant failed to provide proper notice pursuant to C.C.P. sections 437c(a), 1010.6, 12a and 12c. Plaintiff's objection based on timeliness is sustained. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Cathy Meyer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #11596 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Robert Jepsen
My-Linh T. Le of BASSI EDLIN HUIE & BLUM (415-403-4464), appearing for defendant J.T. Thorpe & Son, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO MAINTAIN THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

No argument made. Tentative ruling adopted as modified: Plaintiff's motion to maintain the current trial date with preference is granted. The August 11, 2014 trial date is maintained with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). All dates related to discovery, motions and disclosures remain dictated by this trial date. Last day of trial is August 27, 2014. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Early K. Langley of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #3537 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
